title: Grayscaled Deepslate
description: Recolors Deepslate and all Deepslate blocks to match the classic gray of regular Stone, delivering a clean and cohesive aesthetic.
body:
Grayscaled Deepslate is a simple and balanced texture pack that redesigns the Deepslate family of blocks in Minecraft. 

The original Deepslate blocks, recognized for their deep, nearly black colors, have been entirely re-colored to the lighter gray shades of the classic Stone block. 

This adjustment removes the visual mess created by the dark colors, particularly in underground mines and large construction projects. It creates a smoother, more consistent, and visually calming building palette that blends well with classic Stone block.
